questions.question: What is the main subject doing in this video?
questions.answer_key: A person in a red hat is sledding or sliding down a snowy inflatable slide.
required_visual_evidence: inflatable slide with white and dark blue sections
questions.rationale: Identifies the primary action and main subject essential to understanding the clip.

questions.question: What type of structure or equipment is the person sliding on?
questions.answer_key: An inflatable slide with white and dark blue striped sections and cylindrical tubes.
questions.rationale: Key object that defines the setting and activity; essential for scene comprehension.

questions.question: What is the ground surface covered with?
questions.answer_key: Snow covers the ground around and beneath the inflatable slide.
questions.rationale: Establishes the season and environmental context for the activity.

questions.question: What is visible in the background of this outdoor scene?
questions.answer_key: Bare trees and a metal fence or railing structure are visible in the background.
questions.rationale: Provides location context and reinforces the winter outdoor setting.

questions.question: How many people are visible participating in or observing the activity?
questions.answer_key: At least two people are visible; one sliding and others standing or present nearby.
questions.rationale: Indicates whether this is a solo or group activity; helps establish scene dynamics.
